title: Maximum Number of Points From Grid Queries
titleCn: 矩阵查询可获得的最大分数

testcases.input: grid = [[1,2,3],[2,5,7],[3,5,1]], queries = [5,6,2] Output: [5,8,1] Explanation: The diagrams above show which cells we visit to get points for each query.
testcases.expectedOutput: [5,8,1] Explanation: The diagrams above show which cells we visit to get points for each query.

testcases.input: grid = [[5,2,1],[1,1,2]], queries = [3] Output: [0] Explanation: We can not get any points because the value of the top left cell is already greater than or equal to 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: [0] Explanation: We can not get any points because the value of the top left cell is already greater than or equal to 3.
